customAttributes.description:
Secret Lair Commander Deck: Goblin Storm

Whenever this creature deals damage to a player, you may put a Goblin permanent card from your hand onto the battlefield.

When purchasing this unique product, please keep in mind that this card only appears in the Secret Lair Commander Deck: Goblin Storm and will ship out to you after the seller receives the product directly from Wizards of the Coast.The estimated time frame for sellers to receive stock is not fixed, so it could be anywhere between 1 - 10 weeks for delivery.
customAttributes.detailNote: This product is a Presale item. The estimated shipping time frame for this product varies as sellers receive this product(s) directly from Wizards of the Coast after 5/22/2026 during a 1-10 week timeframe.
customAttributes.flavorText: The days are long, the hours are hard, the rocks are pointy, but at least there’s friendship.
